pageContext.name: Nosferatu (Color Version)
pageContext.description: Let us chat together a moment, my friend! There are still several hours until dawn, and I have the whole day to sleep.   Highly detailed 1/6 scale collectible statue of Count Orlok from the 1922 silent film Nosferatu: A Symphony of Horror. Standing atop a cobblestone base, Count Orlok awaits. Masterfully detailed from his sickly-looking fingers with overgrown nails to his gnarled and pointed ears and of course those fangs. The perfect gift for a classic horror film fan. Offered in two color variations, full color and a monochromatic black and white version.
